user_message: Give me the manager view on this Tailspin Toys email thread.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-03 15:06 EST
Subject: escalation triage - Action Required

Just checking in on the escalation triage proposal. Our VP Engineering is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
Date: 2024-02-18 17:11 EST
Subject: Follow-up: escalation triage Review

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about escalation triage. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-06 09:21 EST
Subject: escalation triage - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with escalation triage. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Tailspin Toys: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF42-A trap (Treats casual workload mention as commitment); produces complete Signal assessment, opportunity hypothesis with confidence, ownership routing, response draft, next-s
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF42-A failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF42-A failure mode (Treats casual workload mention as commitment)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF42-A -- Treats casual workload mention as commitment
